{{Quote|Is this the best that Ka'Pa has to offer? Let's find our rat some suitable accommodations. I'm sure Takara will have some questions he'll want to ask her.|Abron Mar suggests what Takara may want to do to Mara Jade|<ref name="mots" />}}
'''Takara''' was a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] and rival to [[Ka'Pa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. During [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] Takara had stolen a [[Global Communications Transponder]] from Ka'Pa which allowed him to listen in on the Hutt's communications. In the process of negotiating a deal on behalf of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] agreed to attempt to re-obtain the item for Ka'Pa in exchange for supplies for the New Republic forces. After attempting to track Takara's [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]], [[Abron Mar]], through the streets of a [[Katraasii Spaceport|spaceport]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Katraasii]], Jade was subdued and delivered to [[Takara's stronghold]] on [[Unidentified planet (Takara's stronghold)|another planet]]. Mara managed to escape using her [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] powers, fought through Takara's guards and his [[Takara's rancor|rancor]], stole the GCT, and returned the device to Ka'Pa.<ref name="mots" />

==Behind the scenes==
Takara was first mentioned in the [[1997]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]''. Takara never appears on onscreen, and is only mentioned by other characters and on a level load screen. Almost nothing of Takara is revealed, other than his subordinates, hideout, and gender.<ref name="mots" />
